title: 3. The region between the eyebrows: lung.
text:
4.
The region between the eyes: heart.
5.
The region directly below the middle point of eyes: liver.
6.
At the left side of liver: gallbladder.
7.
Below the liver: spleen.
8.
Lateral to the nose apex: stomach.
9.
The central region of the cheeks: large intestine.
